differential_diagnoses: Nephrotic syndrome (secondary to MGRS or glomerular disease)
Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF)
next_steps: Echocardiogram with strain imaging and assessment for myocardial thickness
Serum albumin and 24-hour urine collection for total protein quantification
Kidney biopsy with Congo red staining and electron microscopy
Bone marrow biopsy and aspirate with flow cytometry and mass spectrometry (if available)
Cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement
Technetium-99m pyrophosphate (PYP) scan to evaluate for ATTR cardiac amyloidosis
